site.name: Maʻuʻanga Tokoni Liliu lea
site.defaultDescription: Fakamatala ki he Resource Translator GitHub Action — liliu fakamisini ʻotometiki ʻo e ngaahi faile maʻuʻanga tokoni ʻo fakafou ʻi he Azure AI Translator.

header.search: Fekumi ʻi he ngaahi fakamatala fakapepa
header.searchPlaceholder: Fekumi ki he ngaahi fakamatala fakapepa...

search.title: Fekumi ʻi he ngaahi fakamatala fakapepa
search.placeholder: Fekumi ʻi he ngaahi fakamatala, konga, founga feimeʻatokoni...
search.idleHelp: Kumi ʻa e ngaahi fakamatala ʻo fakatatau ki he kaveinga, fotunga ʻo e faile, fili ki hono fokotuʻutuʻu, pe founga feimeʻatokoni. Fakaʻaongaʻi ʻa e {up} {down} ke navigate, {enter} ke fakaava.
search.empty: ʻIkai ha ola. ʻAhiʻahiʻi ha foʻi lea mahuʻinga kehe.
search.error: ʻOku ʻikai maʻu ʻa e Search Index ʻi he dev. Lele ha faʻu faʻufaʻu.

footer.sourceAria: Vakai ki he maʻuʻanga fakamatala ʻi he GitHub
footer.taglinePrefix: Ko ha GitHub Action ʻoku ne liliu hoʻo ngaahi faile maʻuʻanga tokoni he taimi pe ko ia, langa ʻi ʻolunga ʻi he ʻofisiale
footer.copyrightPrefix: Tukuange ʻi he malumalu ʻo e
